text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Don't go soft on me, Trainer! We got a race to
win, and I want ya to train me to pieces!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Tamamo Cross commits to a showdown with
Oguri Cap, I put her through the intensive
training she asked for. However...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Hey! This whole summer break, I've been workin' like crazy with hardly any rest. Whatcha puttin' me through here?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Geez, I'm surprised I'm still standin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: 'Course I am. Who d'ya think yer dealin' with?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I guess it wasn't all too bad, after all. It's gettin'
time to hit the road, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross jogs over to the bus, her every
step brimming with contentment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But moments before the bus sets off...

text_block_list.name: Fans Surrounding the Bus
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Crosssss! Do your beeeest!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap, don't go losing now! O-GU-RI!
O-GU-RI!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa, da heck is this?! They got our bus
surrounded!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It looks like these are the locals. They've all come
to send us off...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this is nice. Their cheering always makes me
feel—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah yeah, but they sure are noisy. I mean, it's
just some school camp, ya know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just as I'm thinking this level of support does feel a little excessive...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Hehe, this atmosphere is taking me back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mr. C.B. is a winner of the prestigious triple
crown. A free-spirited Umamusume, she walks a
path that's all her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm reeling from the shock of seeing a
legendary Umamusume appearing out of the
blue...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Oh my, campsites are never this exciting.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: With a single exception, that is.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Oh yes, I remember it even now.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Well, keep up the hard work. I expect this autumn
will pose quite the challenge for you, too,
Trainer. But you should enjoy it to the fullest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mr. C.B. saunters off coolly. I relax and take a
deep breath before letting it back out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross and Oguri Cap. They're as
passionate about racing as their fans are about
them. Looks like a remarkable fall is about to
begin.
